stemHtml: Regarding the following message extract, which of the following statements is correct? MOD WS APCH RWY18 FCST=

options.a: Wind shear of unspecified intensity associated with a forecast weather system is approaching the aerodrome which may affect aircraft making approaches to the runway in use: 18.
options.b: This is a wind shear warning forecasting moderate wind shear in the runway 18 approach.
options.c: Moderate wind shear is affecting the approach to runway 18 caused by one or more of a combination of: a front, cumulonimbus cloud, the surrounding terrain, or a temperature inversion.
options.d: This is an aerodrome warning forecasting moderate wind shear in the runway 18 approach.
